tasks.name: Graphics Responsibilities
tasks.description:
WATCH THIS VIDEO: https://vimeo.com/528640992

__1st Priority__

1. Review FDS
2. Access The Templates
3. Create the Theme
4. Create The Logo

---

__2nd Priority__
1. Start creating the graphics according to the order of cards
2. Load the graphic into the Graphics Column - "Approval Needed"

---

__Once graphic is "APPROVED"__

Load the Graphic into the Wasabi Folder - [Other or Images]
Load the PSD into the Wasabi Folder - [PSD Graphics]
Change the label for the graphic to "Completed" in [Graphics In Progress]
Mark off the item in the checklist

---

__Membership Thumbnails__

We will give you a directory of video thumbnails.  We need you to make them into fancy thumbnails.  (Place thumbnail inside of PNG)

We need you to upload the Fancy Thumbnail into Vimeo

Access Details - 7 Minute Course Creators Workshop

takes place April 06 - April 08 at 2PM PST each day!

"7 Minute Course Creators Workshop"

You will find access to the members area where you
will find your "warmup sessions" for the "7 Minute 
Course Creators Workshop!

We also have an AMAZING REWARD waiting for you
inside of this membership...

SO MAKE SURE YOU FINISH IT!

---

Here are your access details to the membership:


Login URL: {url}
Email : {email}
Password : {password}

---

You want to start going through the membership right now!

- There are simple steps for you to follow
- There is a goal for each step
- You earn points and badges as you go
- The final badge has a great reward tied to it!

---

- The VIP Gets you access to the Trello Board for the

and 2nd class concludes.  There will be about a 10
minute break in between

Chad, Steve and Chris

tasks.description:
7 Minute Course Creation 3 Day Workshop
https://attendee.gotowebinar.com/register/8999914304127838991

April 6-8 2PM PST


Make Notifications - Pending

---

GTW Notifications

7 Minute Course Creator Workshop Confirmation

Below, you will find your login credentials.  But first...

Don't miss the LIVE event everybody is talking about!

The 3 day 7 Minute Course Creator Workshop takes place this Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday beginning 5PM EST, 4PM CST, and 2PM PST.

We will show you how to launch simple little, UGLY courses that are going to:

1. Let you build a list of cash-hungry buyers
2. Allow sales to hit your stripe or paypal account each and every day
3. Become an authority Figure in your business
4. Finally show you how to have a real content marketing busines

Here's why you must be on the live calls:

 * Each day, we'll have Live Giveaways & Prizes. Winners must be present on the call!
 * Every live attendee will receive free templates and swipe files only available on the call.
 * We GUARANTEE that you are going to START your very own audience, even if you don't have a following or are just getting started!

We'll See You There!
Chad, Steve and Chris

tasks.description:
Hey there,

You're all set! You're officially registered for the **AIBot Training** happening on **January 27 at 10 AM EDT**.

?? [**Click here to watch the conf video**](# "?")

---

### **Why You Don’t Want to Miss This Call:**

?? **Build ChatBots Faster Than Ever:**
I’ll show you how to create simple, powerful chatbots that can be deployed in just **2 minutes or less**—it’s THAT easy.

?? **Feed Your ChatBots for Unlimited Growth:**
Discover how to keep your bots getting smarter and more effective every day (think _“Feed me, Seymour!”_ ??).

?? **FIRST-EVER Deployment Across Meta Platforms:**
Be the first to see how to instantly deploy your bots to **WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, and Instagram**—an industry game-changer!

---

### **Your Link to Join**

[Click here to access the call](# "?")
(_The link will go live at **10 AM EDT on Jan 27th**—don’t miss it!_)

---

Get ready to transform your business and see why **AIBot Studio** is the ultimate game-changer for 2024.

**I can’t wait to see you there!**

To your success,
Chad

![chadsignature](https://nicelymediallc.com/chadsignature)

P.S. **Set a reminder now—this training is going to blow your mind!** ??
